mechanism_narrative: When the effective federal funds rate exceeds a high threshold, restrictive monetary policy significantly increases the discount rate for future corporate earnings and tightens financial conditions, leading to a contraction in equity multiples and negative forward returns.
evidence_refs: fact:As of 2023-09, FEDFUNDS is 5.33%, the highest level since 2001.
failure_condition: When the trigger condition is met, the average 60-day forward return for the S&P 500 is positive over a 10-year lookback period.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in nonfarm payrolls indicates robust underlying economic activity and strong consumer demand. This translates into higher expected corporate revenues and earnings, supporting positive equity market performance over the medium term.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS has shown consistent positive monthly changes through 2023.
failure_condition: The 3-month change in PAYEMS has a rolling 36-month rank correlation with 20-day forward S&P 500 returns of less than 0.05.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of high, persistent inflation and decelerating retail sales growth signals a stagflationary environment. This dynamic erodes corporate profit margins via higher input costs while simultaneously reducing real consumer purchasing power, leading to negative equity returns.
candidate_trigger: Year-over-year CPIAUCSL > 3.5% AND 3-month average change in RSAFS < 0.2%
evidence_refs: fact:Inflation remains above the Fed's target while retail sales growth has been moderating.
failure_condition: In periods where the trigger condition is met, the S&P 500 produces positive 60-day forward returns in more than 50% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: In a supply-constrained economic regime, an acceleration in industrial production indicates that supply chain bottlenecks are easing. This reduces input cost pressures and increases output for S&P 500 companies, leading to improved earnings outlooks and positive returns.
evidence_refs: fact:Global supply chains have been a key focus since the COVID-19 pandemic.
failure_condition: The information coefficient of INDPRO momentum is not statistically higher in the post-2020 period compared to the 2010-2019 period.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate from its recent low is a historically reliable real-time indicator of recession onset. This signal of sharp economic deterioration leads to downward revisions in earnings forecasts and causes negative equity returns.
candidate_trigger: 3-month moving average of UNRATE rises > 0.5pp from its 12-month low.
failure_condition: When the trigger condition is met, the S&P 500 fails to experience a drawdown of at least 10% over the subsequent 6 months in a majority of historical occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: An elevated year-over-year inflation rate forces the central bank to maintain a restrictive policy stance and erodes the real value of future corporate earnings. Both factors exert continuous downward pressure on equity valuations.
evidence_refs: fact:The latest YoY CPI reading is 3.7%, well above the Fed's 2% target.
failure_condition: The rank correlation between the YoY % change in CPIAUCSL and 20-day forward S&P 500 returns is positive over any rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of a restrictive monetary policy environment and falling housing starts signals a sharp contraction in the interest-rate sensitive housing sector. This has negative spillover effects on the broader economy, consumer wealth, and sentiment, leading to negative equity returns.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 4.0% AND 3-month change in HOUST is negative
evidence_refs: fact:30-year mortgage rates are above 7%, impacting housing affordability and construction.
failure_condition: When the trigger condition is met, the average 60-day forward return for the S&P 500 is statistically indistinguishable from zero (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Positive surprises in the most recent real GDP report signal broad economic momentum. Equity market participants extrapolate this recent strength, leading to positive returns in the very short term as near-term earnings estimates are revised upwards.
evidence_refs: fact:The latest Q2 2023 GDP reading showed continued economic expansion.
failure_condition: The correlation between the quarter-over-quarter percent change in GDPC1 and subsequent 5-day S&P 500 returns is not statistically significant over the full sample period.
